items.checkin_comment: Good strong tasting saison - kicking in at 8%, this has some bite.

items.badge_description: You have a keen taste for this Belgian masterpiece. Did you know the Saison style beer was invented by Belgian farms, brewed in the Winter and served the Spring/Summer to all their workers? Well now you do! That’s 10 different Farmhouse Ales! Try 5 more for Level 3.

user.bio: Drinky drinky, time for less thinky.

items.checkin_comment: A great saison. Kind of a mix between a hefe and a strong ale

items.badge_description: Antarctica, known for its frozen tundra and waddling penguins, might not be the first place you think of when grabbing a cold one… but on April 1st, anything is possible. Thanks for checking in a cold one in early April. Wink wink, nudge nudge. Make sure you're following us @untappd!

items.badge_description: Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least That's 490 distinct venues!

items.checkin_comment: 8 percent saison sign me up. Slight spice opening

user.bio: Drown me in beer like a party slug
Trying to rate beers for what they are, while knowing my taste is heavily subjective.

items.badge_description: You have a keen taste for this Belgian masterpiece. Did you know the Saison style beer was invented by Belgian farms, brewed in the Winter and served the Spring/Summer to all their workers? Well now you do! That’s 50 different Farmhouse Ales! Try 5 more for Level 11.
